# Upstream Attribution

This directory vendors frontend design data adapted from:

- Repository: `nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill`
- URL: `https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill`
- Upstream commit: `b7e3af80f6e331f6fb456667b82b12cade7c9d35`
- License: MIT

Imported here:

- `data/` CSV knowledge base
- upstream `LICENSE`

Adapted here for Codex:

- the Claude-oriented skill packaging was not copied
- the original search and design-system behavior was re-expressed as `scripts/design_library.py`
- this skill uses the imported data through a Codex-native workflow described in `SKILL.md`

Keep this attribution and the upstream license when reusing or redistributing these vendor assets.
